title: Updates
lead: This page tracks notable changes to LetterLab. Updates focus on things users can feel: clarity, reliability, and control.

items.summary: Footer pages and status endpoint added.
details: New footer-linked pages for product, resources, company, and legal.
Status page and /api/status for system health.

items.summary: Tone control and subject line suggestions improved.
details: Tone presets (formal, neutral, friendly) now apply more consistently.
Subject line suggestions respect message goal.
Minor UI tweaks to the composer toolbar.
Paragraph-level rewrite preserves key points better.
Grammar and punctuation checks added to review step.
Reduced unnecessary length in generated drafts.
First draft generation from notes and context.
Gmail and Outlook integration for sending.
Basic template patterns for common scenarios.
